nodes.label: AI as strategic planning partner for workforce allocation
nodes.label_negative: AI as unreliable or missing key constraints
nodes.grounding_span: I will ask AI how to best utilize my headcount based on outgoing needs

nodes.label: AI as communication tone adjuster and proofreader
nodes.grounding_span: I use it to adjust the tone of my slack messages, help me write menial emails

nodes.label: AI as data analysis tool for operational insights
nodes.grounding_span: I fed the CSV, roughly a month worth of usage, asked it compare that to recent purchase orders

nodes.label: AI as delegation tool for physical tasks
nodes.grounding_span: unless we automate the movement aspect... it's less likely to be anything more than a delegation tool

nodes.label: User responsibility for AI output quality
nodes.label_negative: Blaming AI for errors without self-reflection
nodes.grounding_span: I am responsible for what I tell it and unless it hallucinates, the error is usually human

nodes.label: Context-dependent AI use for communication
nodes.label_negative: Uniform AI use regardless of audience
nodes.grounding_span: I tend to examine the audience of the message before making the decision

nodes.label: Operational efficiency and productivity
nodes.grounding_span: divide the team in the most efficient way where both floors are being serviced efficiently

nodes.label: Professional credibility and effective communication
nodes.grounding_span: If it is senior management, I will make sure my messages are short, to the point, and professional

nodes.label: Data-driven decision making and problem solving
nodes.grounding_span: show trends so I could address the issue with ordering team

nodes.label: Personal accountability and skill development
nodes.grounding_span: I am responsible for what I tell it

nodes.label: Satisfaction with AI for data analysis and reporting
nodes.grounding_span: When I brought that to the meeting, management was more than happy to address the issue

nodes.label: Frustration with AI missing constraints or going off script
nodes.grounding_span: it allocated no one to the first floor at all despite me inputting the volume

nodes.label: Acceptance of AI limitations and user responsibility
nodes.grounding_span: AI is a tool. Tools help the user and if I see a tool being used incorrectly, it is something I can fix

nodes.label: Optimism about future AI integration and automation
nodes.grounding_span: I am currently trying to figure out a way to integrate it into our yard management system

nodes.label: Iterative refinement and rephrasing
nodes.grounding_span: I will ask it to redo it so in a way that allocates more staff upstairs

nodes.label: Audience-aware tailoring of communication
nodes.grounding_span: I tend to examine the audience of the message before making the decision
